name: Sky Blaster
description: A 100-shot aerial cake with colorful brocade and crackle effects.

name: Thunder Boom
description: A powerful thunderous shell that bursts into a giant golden chrysanthemum.

name: Sparkler Pack
description: A pack of 12 premium sparklers with long-lasting silver sparkle.

name: Rainbow Fountain
description: A colorful fountain that sprays vibrant sparks in red, green, and blue.

name: Golden Palm
description: A 4-inch aerial shell that blooms into a shimmering golden palm.
